name: dc-medicaid-policy
note: DC DHCF: per-provider-type MMIS Billing Manuals on dc-medicaid.com (Gainwell portal, getDocument/<id> PDFs) + DCMR Title 29 rulemakings on dhcf.dc.gov. dc-medicaid.com DNS returned SERVFAIL at crawl time (2026-06) — host unreachable via curl AND browser; doc IDs captured from Google cache. dhcf.dc.gov curl 200.

_comment: Two sources: (1) dc-medicaid.com Gainwell MMIS portal — ~15 per-provider-type billing manual PDFs at /documentInformation/getDocument/<id>, listed under /nonsecure/billingManual via per-category sub-pages (?categoryType=Transportation|DME|Waivers|Physician|Pharmacy|...). Host DNS SERVFAIL (8.8.8.8) at crawl time so doc IDs taken from search-engine cache; re-verify when DNS recovers. (2) dhcf.dc.gov/page/dhcf-medicaid-regulations — DCMR Title 29 final/emergency rulemaking PDFs (Drupal /node/<id> landing pages → attached PDF). NEMT is brokered via MTM. No standalone Laboratory billing manual found (lab covered inside Physicians/Outpatient). dhcf.dc.gov works via curl; dc-medicaid.com requires browser (and working DNS).
